originalBehavior: The published Ableton Learning Music: Play with notes and scales page mounts inside Ableton's Learning Music shell with the shared widget runtime, local CSS, and route-local media inventory.
localStatus: The local route keeps that lesson shell focused on Ableton Learning Music: Play with notes and scales while removing the broader Learning Music navigation, cookie, and feedback surfaces from the public body.
notes: The route keeps the published widget runtime instead of rewriting the lesson into a custom sequencer.
Public provenance is limited to the shared footer rather than the upstream lesson chrome.
evidence: The route preserves the published Ableton lesson content under a route-local shell.
Music smoke coverage verifies local script loading before route-specific interactions begin.

originalBehavior: The published Learning Music lessons rely on a shared stack of local fonts, icons, sample banks, and Web Audio runtime helpers.
localStatus: The local route archives that first-party media stack under the route tree so playback and widget rendering stay on GitHub Pages without remote playable media.
notes: The shipped local inventory includes 31 audio files and 9 font files under the route tree.
Web Audio remains a browser capability requirement, but media bytes are archived locally.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies zero remote playable media requests for the route.
Docs record the local media inventory for the archive build.

originalBehavior: The published Ableton Learning Music: Play with notes and scales lesson exposes widget controls, transport, and lesson-state changes inside the wider Ableton shell.
localStatus: The local route keeps the lesson controls and visible state changes while neutralizing export and preserving the shared footer as the only original-lesson reference surface.
notes: Non-local lesson links are either rewritten to shipped local Ableton routes or reduced to plain text.
The page keeps local canonical and og:url metadata for subpath hosting.
evidence: The public-surface audit keeps footer-only provenance intact for the route.
Music smoke coverage verifies the route shell stays usable on narrow viewports.
